raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Stop Hate Littering Act provides more tools for victims to pursue civil recourse and for prosecutors to hold offenders accountable.",
    "The Anti-Defamation League reported over 3,600 acts of anti-Semitic assault, vandalism, and harassment in the United States in 2023, the highest number since tracking began in 1979.",
    "The distribution of anti-Semitic flyers is part of a disturbing trend of rising anti-Semitic hate in the United States.",
    "Legislation regarding hate littering aims to address the intimidation and harassment of targeted communities.",
    "In San Diego, at least eight instances of anti-Semitic flyers being distributed on car windshields were documented in 2023.",
    "Hate flyers have been distributed in various California neighborhoods, including Los Angeles and Fresno."
  ]
}
```
